witnesses.description: One exact Armijo backtracking search for f(x)=x^2 from x=1 along direction -2.

checks.claim: At x=1 for f(x)=x^2, direction -2 is a descent direction with directional derivative -4.
checks.notes: The validator differentiates the quadratic and recomputes gradient * direction.

checks.claim: The trial step alpha=1 violates Armijo decrease for c=1/4.
checks.notes: The validator recomputes x+alpha*d, f(candidate), the Armijo right-hand side, and the positive violation.

checks.claim: After one backtrack to alpha=1/2, Armijo decrease holds with slack 1/2.
checks.notes: The validator checks the reduction factor, accepted candidate, objective value, Armijo right-hand side, and nonnegative slack.

checks.claim: The rejected trial step alpha=1 also satisfies the Armijo inequality.

data.certificate: The resource regression parses the source SMT-LIB artifact, emits UnsatFarkas evidence, and independently checks the certificate.

checks.notes: Exact replay computes Armijo violation 1 for alpha=1, so the malformed nonpositive-violation claim is rejected by checked Farkas evidence.

checks.claim: At x=1 for f(x)=x^2, direction -2 has nonnegative directional derivative.

data.certificate: The resource regression parses the source SMT-LIB artifact, emits UnsatFarkas evidence, and independently checks the certificate.

checks.notes: Exact replay computes directional derivative = 2 * (-2) = -4, so the malformed nonnegative-directional-derivative claim is rejected through the checked QF_LRA/Farkas route.

checks.claim: After one backtrack to alpha=1/2, the accepted candidate point is x=1/4.

data.certificate: The resource regression parses the source SMT-LIB artifact, emits UnsatFarkas evidence, and independently checks the certificate.

checks.notes: Exact replay computes accepted_x = 1 + (1/2)*(-2) = 0, so the malformed accepted-candidate claim 1/4 is rejected through the checked QF_LRA/Farkas route.

checks.claim: General line-search termination, sufficient-decrease lemmas, Wolfe conditions, and convergence rates require future Lean reconstruction.

data.target_theorem_shape: Armijo/backtracking line-search termination and convergence theorems for smooth descent methods, plus Wolfe-condition variants and rate statements
data.future_checker: Lean module with no sorryAx dependencies plus exact rational certificate bridges for finite line-search witnesses

checks.notes: The finite rows check only one rational quadratic line-search instance; line-search theory remains proof-assistant work.
